name: The Mission Group plc
summary: The Mission Group plc provides marketing and advertising related services in the United Kingdom, rest of Europe, Asia, and the United States. The company offers marketing communications services specializing in the technology, medical, and automotive sector; public relations services; and advertising, media buying, digital marketing, events, and training services. It also provides sales promotion services; sports, fitness, and entertainment marketing services; pricing and market access services for the healthcare sector; brand development and creative direct communication services; and operates as a property-marketing agency providing advertising, media, brochures, signage, exhibitions, CGI, animation, intranet, and photography services. The company was formerly known as The Mission Marketing Group plc and changed its name to The Mission Group plc in September 2019. The Mission Group plc was incorporated in 2006 and is based in London, the United Kingdom.
